name: USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN-72)
detail: Arabian Sea. F/A-18s, F-35Cs. Now sole active US carrier in theater after USS Ford fire.

name: USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN-78) — FIRE / DEPARTING
detail: Sustained 30-hour onboard fire Mar 18, departing theater for emergency repairs at NATO facility. Leaves USS Lincoln as sole US carrier in theater. Iran claims missile strike; US Navy cites 'internal mechanical incident.' Cause under investigation. No confirmed sailor fatalities from fire.

name: F-15E Strike Eagle
detail: 3 lost to friendly fire in Kuwait

name: KC-135 Stratotanker — Crashed Mar 13
detail: 4th US aircraft lost in conflict. Crashed in western Iraq supporting Epic Fury ops. CENTCOM: 'not due to hostile or friendly fire.' Islamic Resistance in Iraq claims shootdown. 6 crew onboard, no ejection seats.

name: French Aircraft Carrier (CDG)
detail: French carrier joined US CENTCOM area. Pro-Iranian Iraq groups threatened French interests. French soldier CWO Arnaud Frion killed in Mala Qara base drone strike Mar 13.

name: USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77) — ACCELERATED DEPLOYMENT
detail: Completing pre-deployment certification. Now prioritized as urgent replacement for USS Ford. Would carry CVW-8. Expected to enter theater by late March/early April. Ford's departure makes Bush's deployment critical to maintaining two-carrier presence.

name: Ukraine — 201 Military Experts Deployed to Gulf
detail: Ukraine deployed 201 military experts to Gulf states on Day 19 to assist with countering Iranian drones, drawing on Ukrainian battlefield experience with Russian-supplied Shahed-type drones. Significant development in broader coalition-building around US Gulf operations.

name: 82nd Airborne Division (~1,000+) — DEPLOYING
detail: Elements of the 82nd Airborne Division (1st BCT + HQ staff + enablers, ~1,000+ paratroopers) ordered to deploy to CENTCOM AOR March 26. Maj. Gen. Brandon Tegtmeier and division staff included. Mission unclear — analysts note possible Kharg Island seizure scenario (handles ~90% of Iranian oil exports). Total US forces in region now ~50,000+. IDF Chief Zamir simultaneously warning of 15,000 Israeli soldier shortfall.
